name: settings
context: Configure repository settings — branch protection, collaborators, merge options, and webhooks
info: Configure GitHub repository settings after creation: branch protection rules, collaborator access, merge strategy options, default branch, issue/wiki/project toggles, and webhook registration. Branch protection integrates with [[github/actions]] for required status checks and [[github/pulls/review]] for required approvals. Use `octokit.repos.update()`, `octokit.repos.updateBranchProtection()`, or `gh api` commands. See [[github/auth]] for authentication and [[github/repos/create]] for initial repo setup.

sections.title: Branch protection rules
sections.body: Protect branches with required status checks (from [[github/actions]]), required review approvals (from [[github/pulls/review]]), enforce admin compliance, require signed commits, require linear history, and restrict who can push. Use `octokit.repos.updateBranchProtection()` to set rules. These rules gate all PR merges on the protected branch.

sections.title: Managing collaborators
sections.body: Add collaborators with permission levels: `pull` (read), `triage` (manage issues), `push` (write), `maintain` (manage without admin), `admin` (full control). Use `octokit.repos.addCollaborator()` or `gh api`. For organizations, use team-based access instead of individual collaborators for easier management.

sections.title: Merge strategy configuration
sections.body: Control which merge methods are available for [[github/pulls/merge]]: merge commit, squash, rebase. Enable `allow_auto_merge` for PRs to merge automatically when all requirements are met. Set `delete_branch_on_merge` to auto-clean head branches. Configure squash commit title/message format with `squash_merge_commit_title` and `squash_merge_commit_message`.

sections.title: CODEOWNERS
sections.body: Define code ownership in `.github/CODEOWNERS` to auto-assign reviewers based on file paths. Each line maps a glob pattern to GitHub users or teams. When a PR modifies matching files, those owners are automatically requested as reviewers. Combine with branch protection's `require_code_owner_reviews` to enforce.

links.context: Required reviews enforced by branch protection
Merge options control PR merge behavior
Required status checks from Actions workflows
Admin token required for settings changes

related.note: This is a sub-skill of the repos skill
